attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
SALES_ORDER_KEY,
HEADER_ID,
COMPLETE_ORDER_RESULT_CODE,
SALES_ORDER_EXPIRATION_DTM,
RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME,
BK_DEAL_ID,
CISCO_BOOKED_STATUS_ROLE,
EDW_CREATE_USER,
EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
FROM
( SELECT 
SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 				SALES_ORDER_KEY,
SUXOOHE.HEADER_ID 					HEADER_ID,
SUXOOHE.COMPLETE_ORDER_RESULT_CODE 	COMPLETE_ORDER_RESULT_CODE,
SUXOOHE.EXPIRATION_DATE 			SALES_ORDER_EXPIRATION_DTM,
SUXOOHE.CISCO_BOOK_DATE 			RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME,
SUXOOHE.ATTRIBUTE8  				BK_DEAL_ID,
CASE WHEN SUXOOHE.CISCO_BOOK_RESULT_CODE='BOOKED' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END CISCO_BOOKED_STATUS_ROLE,
USER 								EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 				EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
SUXOOHE.CREATE_DATETIME 			CREATE_DATETIME
FROM $$STGDB.ST_UO_XXCCA_OE_ORD_HEADERS_EXT SUXOOHE
INNER JOIN (
		$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
			ON( NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSO.SS_CODE)
		)
ON ( SUXOOHE.HEADER_ID=SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' )
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY 
						SUXOOHE.HEADER_ID
		ORDER BY SUXOOHE.CREATE_DATETIME DESC	)  =1
UNION ALL
SELECT 
SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 				SALES_ORDER_KEY,
EUXOOHE.HEADER_ID 					HEADER_ID,
EUXOOHE.COMPLETE_ORDER_RESULT_CODE 	COMPLETE_ORDER_RESULT_CODE,
EUXOOHE.EXPIRATION_DATE 			SALES_ORDER_EXPIRATION_DTM,
EUXOOHE.CISCO_BOOK_DATE 			RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME,
EUXOOHE.ATTRIBUTE8  				BK_DEAL_ID ,
CASE WHEN EUXOOHE.CISCO_BOOK_RESULT_CODE='BOOKED' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END CISCO_BOOKED_STATUS_ROLE,
USER 								EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 				EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
EUXOOHE.CREATE_DATETIME 			CREATE_DATETIME
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_UO_XXCCA_OE_ORD_HEADERS_EXT EUXOOHE
INNER JOIN (
		$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
			ON( NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSO.SS_CODE)
		)
ON ( EUXOOHE.HEADER_ID=SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' )
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_UO_XXCCA_OE_ORD_HEADERS_EXT SUXOOHE
ON(SUXOOHE.HEADER_ID <> EUXOOHE.HEADER_ID)
WHERE EUXOOHE.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI') EXT_OUT
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY HEADER_ID ORDER BY CREATE_DATETIME DESC ) = 1

SELECT
SUXOOHE.HEADER_ID,
SUXOOHE.ATTRIBUTE18,
SUXOOHE.ATTRIBUTE19,
SUXOOHE.ATTRIBUTE20,
SUXOOHE.ATTRIBUTE3,
SUXOOHE.ATTRIBUTE8,
SUXOOHE.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
SUXOOHE.CISCO_BOOK_DATE,
SUXOOHE.CISCO_BOOK_RESULT_CODE,
SUXOOHE.CMS_SOURCE_HEADER_ID,
SUXOOHE.CANCEL_ORDER_DATE,
SUXOOHE.COMPLETE_ORDER_DATE,
SUXOOHE.COMPLETE_ORDER_RESULT_CODE,
SUXOOHE.PROGRAM_TYPE,
SUXOOHE.EXPIRATION_DATE,
SUXOOHE.DOC_IMAGING_FLAG,
SUXOOHE.CDB_DATA_SOURCE,
SUXOOHE.CDB_ENQUEUE_TIME,
SUXOOHE.CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME,
SUXOOHE.CDB_ENQUEUE_SEQ,
SUXOOHE.BATCH_ID,
SUXOOHE.QUEUE_ID,
SUXOOHE.PROCESS_SET_ID,
SUXOOHE.Q_CREATION_DATE,
SUXOOHE.Q_UPDATE_DATE,
SUXOOHE.ACTION_CODE,
SUXOOHE.CREATE_DATETIME,
'RI'	EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_UO_XXCCA_OE_ORD_HEADERS_EXT SUXOOHE
WHERE NOT EXISTS
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC ON( NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSO.SS_CODE)
		 WHERE SUXOOHE.HEADER_ID=SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' )
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SUXOOHE.HEADER_ID	ORDER BY SUXOOHE.CREATE_DATETIME DESC	)  =1

SELECT
SALES_ORDER_KEY,
HEADER_ID,
COMPLETE_ORDER_RESULT_CODE,
SALES_ORDER_EXPIRATION_DTM,
RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME,
BK_DEAL_ID,
CISCO_BOOKED_STATUS_ROLE,
EDW_CREATE_USER,
EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
FROM
( SELECT 
SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 				SALES_ORDER_KEY,
SBXOOHE.HEADER_ID 					HEADER_ID,
SBXOOHE.COMPLETE_ORDER_RESULT_CODE 	COMPLETE_ORDER_RESULT_CODE,
SBXOOHE.EXPIRATION_DATE 			SALES_ORDER_EXPIRATION_DTM,
SBXOOHE.CISCO_BOOK_DATE 			RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME,
SBXOOHE.ATTRIBUTE8  				BK_DEAL_ID,
CASE WHEN SBXOOHE.CISCO_BOOK_RESULT_CODE='BOOKED' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END CISCO_BOOKED_STATUS_ROLE,
USER 								EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 				EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
SBXOOHE.CREATE_DATETIME 			CREATE_DATETIME
FROM $$STGDB.ST_BO_XXCCA_OE_ORD_HEADERS_EXT SBXOOHE
INNER JOIN (
		$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
			ON( NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSO.SS_CODE)
		)
ON ( SBXOOHE.HEADER_ID=SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' )
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY 
						SBXOOHE.HEADER_ID
		ORDER BY SBXOOHE.CREATE_DATETIME DESC	)  =1
UNION ALL
SELECT 
SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 				SALES_ORDER_KEY,
EBXOOHE.HEADER_ID 					HEADER_ID,
EBXOOHE.COMPLETE_ORDER_RESULT_CODE 	COMPLETE_ORDER_RESULT_CODE,
EBXOOHE.EXPIRATION_DATE 			SALES_ORDER_EXPIRATION_DTM,
EBXOOHE.CISCO_BOOK_DATE 			RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME,
EBXOOHE.ATTRIBUTE8  				BK_DEAL_ID ,
CASE WHEN EBXOOHE.CISCO_BOOK_RESULT_CODE='BOOKED' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END CISCO_BOOKED_STATUS_ROLE,
USER 								EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 				EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
EBXOOHE.CREATE_DATETIME 			CREATE_DATETIME
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_BO_XXCCA_OE_ORD_HEADERS_EXT EBXOOHE
INNER JOIN (
		$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
			ON( NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSO.SS_CODE)
		)
ON ( EBXOOHE.HEADER_ID=SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' )
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_BO_XXCCA_OE_ORD_HEADERS_EXT SBXOOHE
ON(SBXOOHE.HEADER_ID <> EBXOOHE.HEADER_ID)
WHERE EBXOOHE.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI') EXT_OUT
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY HEADER_ID ORDER BY CREATE_DATETIME DESC ) = 1

SELECT
SBXOOHE.HEADER_ID,
SBXOOHE.ATTRIBUTE18,
SBXOOHE.ATTRIBUTE19,
SBXOOHE.ATTRIBUTE20,
SBXOOHE.ATTRIBUTE3,
SBXOOHE.ATTRIBUTE8,
SBXOOHE.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
SBXOOHE.CISCO_BOOK_DATE,
SBXOOHE.CISCO_BOOK_RESULT_CODE,
SBXOOHE.CMS_SOURCE_HEADER_ID,
SBXOOHE.CANCEL_ORDER_DATE,
SBXOOHE.COMPLETE_ORDER_DATE,
SBXOOHE.COMPLETE_ORDER_RESULT_CODE,
SBXOOHE.PROGRAM_TYPE,
SBXOOHE.EXPIRATION_DATE,
SBXOOHE.DOC_IMAGING_FLAG,
SBXOOHE.CDB_DATA_SOURCE,
SBXOOHE.CDB_ENQUEUE_TIME,
SBXOOHE.CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME,
SBXOOHE.CDB_ENQUEUE_SEQ,
SBXOOHE.BATCH_ID,
SBXOOHE.QUEUE_ID,
SBXOOHE.PROCESS_SET_ID,
SBXOOHE.Q_CREATION_DATE,
SBXOOHE.Q_UPDATE_DATE,
SBXOOHE.ACTION_CODE,
SBXOOHE.CREATE_DATETIME,
'RI'	EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_BO_XXCCA_OE_ORD_HEADERS_EXT SBXOOHE
WHERE NOT EXISTS
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC ON ( NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSO.SS_CODE)
		 WHERE SBXOOHE.HEADER_ID=SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' )
